name: CentyPack Effective Buying Rates
query:
SELECT
  c.name AS "Product:Link/Crop:220",
  c.product_code AS "Code:Data:90",
  c.default_min_buying_rate AS "Default Minimum:Currency:130",
  COALESCE(dp.buying_rate, c.default_min_buying_rate) AS "Effective Buying Rate:Currency:140",
  CASE WHEN dp.name IS NULL THEN 'default_minimum' ELSE 'daily_override' END AS "Rate Source:Data:130",
  dp.name AS "Daily Price Record:Link/CentyPack Product Daily Price:220"
FROM `tabCrop` c
LEFT JOIN `tabCentyPack Product Daily Price` dp
  ON dp.product = c.name
  AND dp.price_date = %(price_date)s
  AND dp.active = 1
WHERE c.active = 1
ORDER BY c.product_code, c.name
